about_text_1: Senior Fullstack Developer with 8+ years building performant, accessible web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and modern JavaScript. I specialize in translating complex requirements into elegant, user-centered interfaces that scale.
about_text_2: Frontend performance advocate who has reduced initial load times by up to 45% through code splitting, lazy loading, and optimized asset delivery. My implementations consistently achieve 90+ Lighthouse performance scores.
about_text_3: Built and led frontend initiatives that increased test coverage from 45% to over 80%, implementing automated testing pipelines that catch regressions before production. Created 20+ reusable component libraries adopted across multiple teams.
about_text_4: Currently available for remote projects. I thrive in collaborative, cross-functional teams where continuous learning and knowledge sharing drive product excellence.
experience_job_3: Senior Frontend Developer, Test Automation Engineer and Analyst Programmer
experience_job_text_1: Frontend tasks with Vue.js and Nuxt.js in the YourDictionary.com team. Creation of new features, enforcing best practices and working in an agile environment in a decentralized international team.
experience_job_text_2: Frontend development in Backbone, create unit testing with Karma, functional testing with Gerkin (launching an automated process run on Jenkins) and Testing AB of beta versions before going to upstream. A part of that, I also review code of pull request from different teams, including React code and update, modify or debug Java code in the backend part of the flow when it is needed.
experience_job_text_3_1: Frontend development in Backbone, JQuery and Lodash for client-company of the travel agency sector in Barcelona. (10/2017 - 04/2018)
experience_job_text_3_2: Implementation of automated testing with Test Complete and Jenkins in a client-company of the pharmaceutical sector in Parets del Vallès. (01/2017 - 10/2017)
experience_job_text_3_3: Migration of application to web format, responsive and Single Page Application (with AngularJS) for client-company of the banking sector in Sant Cugat del Vallès. (07/2016 - 12/2016)
experience_job_text_4: Implementation of the "frontend" web for charging and contracting insurance applications in travel assistance and car insurance.
experience_job_text_5: In charge of maintaining the web portal of the organization (XML + XLS + Oracle with Cocoon) and other applications (with Struts).
experience_job_text_6: Web development with ASP language, accessing a Microsoft SQL Server database with intensive use of HTML and Javascript.
header_location: Senior Fullstack Developer | Remote from Barcelona, Spain | Vue.js & Nuxt.js Expert
interests_text_1: I like to create websites for fun, trying out new technologies and tools to improve myself as a developer and stay up to date with current tech.
interests_text_2: Apart from being a frontend developer, I am a gym goer and enjoy training with barbells and iron plates. I also love watching TED talks and I also enjoy binge watching films and series on Netflix (for improving my english skills 😉).
interests_text_3: And during the summer, I enjoy go camping with my family near the sea.
skills_data_text_5: Calculation and analysis in SQL and spreadsheets
